== Super Motor Cortex ==
"Subject 15 has stabilized. Dopamine from the brain is increased twenty-fold, and the subject took less than seven minutes to run a marathon." --Superbrain Files

{{Organ Tabber
|Name=Super Motor Cortex
|Rarity=green
|ID Number=8
|Initial HP=0
|HP Increase=0
|Initial ATK=0
|ATK Increase=0
|Initial DEF=0
|DEF Increase=0
|Initial RUSH=3
|RUSH Increase=0
|Effect 1=When exploring, Dodge +5%
|Initial Effect Value 1=
|Effect Value Increase 1=
|Effect 2=
|Initial Effect Value 2=
|Effect Value Increase 2=
|Effect 3=
|Initial Effect Value 3=
|Effect Value Increase 3=
|Effect 4=
|Initial Effect Value 4=
|Effect Value Increase 4=
|}}

== Source ==
Starting Evolution

[[Category:Organs]]
[[Category:Green Organs]]
__NOTOC__
